questions.stem: If CPI equals 1.0 what does this indicate?
questions.explanation: A CPI of 1 means earned value equals actual cost so the project is exactly on budget.

questions.stem: If SPI is less than 1 what does this mean?
questions.explanation: SPI below 1 means less work has been completed than planned.

questions.stem: If CV is positive what does that indicate?
questions.explanation: Positive CV means EV is greater than AC meaning the project is under budget.

questions.stem: If SV is negative what does this indicate?
questions.explanation: Negative schedule variance means the project has completed less work than planned.

questions.stem: A project has CPI = 0.85. What does this mean?
choices: The project is ahead of schedule
questions.explanation: CPI less than 1 means the project is spending more money than the value of work completed.

questions.stem: A project has SPI = 1.15. What does this indicate?
choices: The project is ahead of schedule
questions.explanation: SPI above 1 means more work has been completed than planned.
